sections.paragraph:
Original: אזור

Transliteration: 'êzôr

Phonetic: ay-zore'

BDB Definition:

  1. waist-cloth, the innermost piece of clothing
    1. of God's power over kings (figuratively)
    2. of faithfulness (metaphorically)
  2. waistband

Origin: from H246

TWOT entry: 59a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
